units.content: Kusne et al. Nature Communications 11:5966 2020 describes CAMEO closed-loop materials discovery via Bayesian active learning
paper constitutes prior art for closed-loop materials-discovery autonomy
CAMEO does not include a measurer-correlation classifier
CAMEO does not include an admissibility-filtered vocabulary
CAMEO does not include an echo-chamber three-way classification
absences of measurer-correlation classifier, admissibility-filtered vocabulary, and echo-chamber classification differentiate present invention from CAMEO
